phrases.intent_en: How do I pay the port tax for foot passengers?
phrases.text_local: Πώς πληρώνω τον λιμενικό φόρο για πεζούς;
phrases.cultural_note: Port tax is typically handled at ticket counters alongside ferry tickets. Direct payment desks may not exist.

likely_response.translation_en: You pay at the ticket office.

responses.english: You pay at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Which gate is for vehicle boarding to Santorini?
phrases.text_local: Ποια πύλη είναι για επιβίβαση αυτοκινήτων προς Σαντορίνη;
phrases.cultural_note: Vehicle boarding gates are not individually labeled. Signs lead to the loading ramps where ferries are assigned dynamically.

phrases.intent_en: When does the next ferry to Piraeus depart?
phrases.text_local: Πότε αναχωρεί το επόμενο πλοίο για Πειραιά;
phrases.cultural_note: Departure boards are often not visible or updated in real-time. Staff assistance is the most reliable source.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the ticket office for Minoan Lines?
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι το ταμείο της Minoan Lines;
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry companies typically have dedicated counters. Signs are the primary navigational aid in transport hubs.

likely_response.local: Αριστερά στην αίθουσα αναμονής, ταμείο Minoan.
likely_response.translation_en: The Minoan Lines ticket office is inside the passenger terminal building, on the ground floor. Follow the signs to the waiting hall.

responses.english: The Minoan Lines ticket office is inside the passenger terminal building, on the ground floor. Follow the signs to the waiting hall.
responses.french: Αριστερά στην αίθουσα αναμονής, ταμείο Minoan.

phrases.intent_en: Does the taxi stand have a fixed meter rate to Knossos?
phrases.text_local: Υπάρχει σταθερή τιμή ταξί για Κνωσσό;
phrases.cultural_note: Taxi fares to tourist destinations are often negotiable unless a fixed rate is explicitly posted.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the passenger waiting hall with seats?
phrases.text_local: Πού είναι η αίθουσα αναμονής επιβατών;
phrases.cultural_note: Waiting halls are core infrastructure in ferry terminals. Signs are the standard navigational tool.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Passenger Waiting Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Passenger Waiting Hall.
